title: FishOnMC Pack
description: Unofficial performance modpack for FishOnMC with integrated fishing HUDs
body:
## FishOnMC Pack (Unofficial)

**Unofficial Performance Pack for FishOnMC Server**  
*This is a fan-made pack and is not affiliated with or endorsed by FishOnMC*

### What It Does

**Core Performance:**
- **2-3x FPS boost** from Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore
- **Smoother chunk loading** with C2ME and Noisium for FishOnMC's 15+ fishing locations
- **Better particles & entities** via ImmediatelyFast and Entity Culling (key for tournament splash effects)
- **Memory efficiency** through ModernFix for extended play sessions

**FishOnMC HUD Features:**
- **Real-time fishing stats** from FishonMC-Extras mod (Pet display, contest tracking, quest progress)
- **Optimized for FishOnMC's resource pack** - no texture glitching
- **Anti-cheat safe** - uses only FishOnMC's whitelisted performance mods

### Why Download This?

✅ **Zero Setup** - Pre-tuned configs for `play.fishonmc.net` (1.21.4+)  
✅ **Optimized** - Stable FPS with 50+ players and heavy particles  
✅ **Ban-Safe** - Follows FishOnMC's mod policy exactly (no gameplay advantages)  

### Important Notes

**Unofficial Status:**
- **Not Endorsed by FishOnMC** - This is an independent fan project
- **Use at Your Own Risk** - While all mods are whitelisted, this pack is not reviewed by FishOnMC staff

**Installation:**
- Install Fabric Loader for 1.21.4+
- Use any Fabric-compatible launcher (Prism/Modrinth App)
- Accept FishOnMC's resource pack on first join

**Credit:** Uses configs from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)
